article_meta.title: Washington DC Trump celebrates US' long history giving foreign enemies 'hell' at massive military parade The military pa

reasoning: The model mixed valid author-prose bias with several false positives and used non-standard bias labels. It did not flag quoted text as author bias but mislabeled types and invented/meta items. It also missed multiple clear instances in the author’s prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: No flagged item was a direct quote; all selected text was in author prose or meta, so no attribution violation.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Three of five items are not genuine author-level bias: outlet/source line, ‘authority appeal’ for standard attribution, and an invented summary about absence of counterpoints.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed author-prose instances such as subjective ‘patriotic event,’ ‘incredibly tight’ security, ‘massive’/‘historic scene,’ and passive ‘was also said to include’ (omission of source attribution).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed types (Selection Bias, Loaded Language, Source Bias, Authority Appeal, Absence of Counterpoints) instead of the defined categories like Word Choice, Slant, Bias by Omission, Omission of Source Attribution.
